seo.title: Thank You
seo.description: Thank you for contacting BuiltWell CT. A member of our remodeling team will reach out within one business day to schedule your free consultation. In the meantime, feel free to browse our portfolio or give us a call at (203) 466-9148.

data.content:
Confirmation Message
Thank you for reaching out. We'll review the details of your
project and contact you within one business day to confirm
your consultation and answer any questions you have in the
meantime.

If you booked an on-site consultation, we'll confirm the
appointment details and the name of the team member who will
be visiting.

If you booked a remote consultation via Google Meet or Zoom,
your confirmation and video link have been sent to the email
address you provided. Check your spam folder if you don't
see it within a few minutes.

What Happens Next

data.title: What to Expect
data.content:
Step 1: Confirmation
We'll confirm your appointment date, time, and point of
contact within one business day.

Step 2: The Consultation
We'll visit your home or connect with you by video call to
discuss your project, assess the space, and answer your
questions. There's no charge for the consultation and no
obligation to move forward.

Step 3: Your Written Estimate
After the consultation, we'll prepare a detailed written
estimate covering scope, materials, timeline, and cost.
Most estimates are delivered within three to five business
days of the consultation.

Contact Information (if preferred)

data.title: Prefer to Call?
data.content:
If you'd like to reach us directly, we're available by
phone Monday through Friday, 8am to 5pm, and Saturday,
8am to 3pm.

Fairfield County: (203) 919-9616
New Haven County: (203) 466-9148

Explore While You Wait (optional section / developer note)

data.title: Learn More About Our Work
data.content:
[DEVELOPER NOTE: This section can display 2-3 featured
links or project cards. Suggested links below.]

While we get back to you, you're welcome to review how we
work, see how we approach a typical project, or learn more
about what's included in a typical remodeling project.
